channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A run of potholes at the roadside, 1st March
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Greenhills Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A run of potholes in the gutter/verge area, 1st March
item.description:
As above, several potholes along this road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extensive litter, 1st March
item.description:
There is extensive litter in the verge along both sides of Brockhampton Lane from the corner of GE to the sewage treatment plant. Please can you organise a litter pick for this road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockhampton Lane, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive hole ruins my tyres, 1st March
item.description:
Please just fix this massive hole
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingscroft Road, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 1st March
item.description:
Just opposite gate to Lotts Meadow

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wide 15 inch pothole in marsh lane., 1st March
item.description:
In marsh lane by marsh garden junction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Paul's Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small but deep 5inch ish pothole., 1st March
item.description:
Marsh gardens to marsh lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Paul's Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham

item.title: 33 inch long pothole on enterance to marsh garden/lane, 1st March
item.description:
Outside number 73 marsh lane. marsh lane to marsh garden junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Paul's Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham

item.title: Serval small pots holes with a large 70 cm pothole. before then car dealerahipa, 1st March
item.description:
Outside number 336.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 335, Swindon Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham

item.title: 5cm pothole in middle of road, 1st March
item.description:
Outside 19 Ravensgate Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Ravensgate Road, Cheltenham

item.title: Large & deep pothole, 1st March
item.description:
On Bibury Road, opposite turning of Notgrove Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Bibury Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping rear of Hungerford St, 1st March
item.description:
Multiple items including: office chair, weird blue soft chair, folding chair, lots of plastic piping and cable, supermarket delivery crate, large cardboard boxes. These are about half way along the lane at the rear of Hungerford St

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Albert Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in lane at the rear of Hungerford St, 1st March
item.description:
Flytipped items include: soft furnishings, multiple chairs, litter bin, coffee table frame(?) These are about a third of the way up Hungerford Lane from the St Paul’s Road entrance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hungerford Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped furniture, 1st March
item.description:
Flytipped furniture next to 89 St Paul’s Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, St Paul's Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multi deep potholes from the mini roundabout turning from Tommy Taylor’s onto Swindon lane all the way down to the railway crossing. Whole area of this road needs completely resurfacing not just filling as they keep reappearing, 1st March
item.description:
Deep pot hole just off mini roundabout turning left from Tommy Taylor’s into Swindon lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 1st March
item.description:
Chair dumped on Walton Cardiff Lane up by the new phase of Bloor houses being built on the Tewkesbury Meadow estate in Walton Cardiff. What 3 words reference:///owned.reason.dizzy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wheatpieces, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge on pavement, 1st March
item.description:
Fridge on pavement outside 65 St Paul’s Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, St Paul's Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham

item.title: Washing machine on pavement, 1st March

Washing machine on pavement outside 13 Henrietta Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8-9, Henrietta Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham

item.title: Pothole at entrance to Clavel &Hind Brewery, 1st March
item.description:
Couple of holes by curb on entrance/exit of brewery
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Road, Tewkesbury

item.title: Significant pothole in road, 1st March
item.description:
Several very large potholes in road - side closest to model railway - in the middle of traffic calming blocks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
